series_metadata.series_description: Structured interview, assessment and selectiondocumentation for ODJFS positions. May contain proficiency tests, oral and writteninterviews, various hands-on computer exercises and scoring information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until superseded, obsolete or replaced, then destroy provided no legal action is pending. ; Electronic: Retain in office until superseded, obsolete or replaced, then destroy provided no legal action is pending., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
